    B

    before(MethodContext) - Method in class com.habbashx.Interceptor.HeaderInterceptor
    Populates MethodContext.setHeaders(String[]) from the method's @Headers annotation.
    before(MethodContext) - Method in interface com.habbashx.Interceptor.Interceptor
    Invoked before the HTTP request is dispatched.
    before(MethodContext) - Method in class com.habbashx.Interceptor.PathQueryInterceptor
    Resolves path variables and builds the query string, then updates MethodContext.setUrl(String) with the fully-formed URL.
    body() - Element in annotation interface com.habbashx.annotation.Request
    An optional static request body string sent with the request.
    body(String) - Method in class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
     
    build() - Method in class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
    Builds and returns the MethodContext.
    builder() - Static method in class com.habbashx.proxy.MethodContext
    Returns a new MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder for fluent construction.
    BuildStrategy - Interface in com.habbashx.request.strategy
    Functional interface that builds a fully configured HttpRequest from a pre-populated HttpRequest.Builder and an optional request body string.
    Built-in strategies - Section in class com.habbashx.request.RequestMethod
